name: witness-generation
title: Witness Generation from EVM Execution Traces for ZK Prover in Rust
hypothesis: A Rust witness generator can extract from an EVM execution trace the private inputs needed for a ZK validity circuit, processing traces of 1000 transactions in < 30 seconds with deterministic output (same trace -> same witness).
null_hypothesis: Witness generation from EVM traces cannot meet the 30-second threshold for 1000 transactions due to the combinatorial explosion of field element conversions and Merkle proof reconstruction, or determinism cannot be guaranteed due to hash map ordering or floating-point divergence.
prerequisites: RU-L1 EVM Executor (complete: Go executor producing ExecutionTrace with TraceEntry)
RU-L4 State Database (complete: Go Poseidon2 SMT with account+storage tries)
